commit.subject: LU-14470 test: add striped directory creation test
commit.message:
LU-14470 test: add striped directory creation test

Add a subtest to verify creating sub file under striped directory will
trigger sync-on-lock-cancel in sanityn test_33c.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanityn mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 env=ONLY=33c,ONLY_REPEAT=100
Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I7891823ba55c5b2f3adaa4e93ea4747fd1f236c6
